response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer but does not match the core requirements of this role. Recent and dominant experience is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile platforms, not C++ on Windows. The only professional C++ experience is roughly 6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015, far below the 5–10 years required. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience, no Windows platform focus, and no exposure to capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income. Hiring would require the candidate to retrain into both a new tech stack and a new domain.
strengths: Solid 10+ years of overall software engineering experience with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Strong communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching (Selenium course, Web Internals)
Polyglot background including Java, C#, and some historical C/C++ exposure
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (2014–2015), far short of the 5–10 years required
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server or Oracle; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No financial services, capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure, and no Windows platform focus or Summit platform experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income / investment banking domain background
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform experience
